name: punch-camera-smooth-follow
description: Verify the character begins the punch slide before the camera follows with a delayed eased offset.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local R=game:GetService('RunService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer task.wait(1) local playerGui=p:WaitForChild('PlayerGui',10) assert(playerGui,'PlayerGui missing') local g=playerGui:WaitForChild('PunchWallHUD',10) assert(g,'PunchWallHUD missing') local automation=g:WaitForChild('PunchWallClientAutomation',10) assert(automation,'client automation missing') local h=p.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid') local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local before=root.Position local base=h.CameraOffset automation:Invoke('Punch') local earlyRoot,earlyOffset local peak=0 for i=1,15 do R.RenderStepped:Wait() if i==14 then earlyRoot=root.Position earlyOffset=h.CameraOffset end peak=math.max(peak,(h.CameraOffset-base).Magnitude) end for i=1,40 do R.RenderStepped:Wait() peak=math.max(peak,(h.CameraOffset-base).Magnitude) end return H:JSONEncode({delay=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraFollowDelaySeconds'),enabled=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraFollowEnabled'),earlyRootMove=(earlyRoot-before).Magnitude,earlyCameraMove=(earlyOffset-base).Magnitude,peakCameraMove=peak,activeAfter=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraFollowActive')})

steps.label: character leads camera with smooth follow
